title: Power efficient stylus for an electronic device
abstract: Systems, methods, and computer-readable media for enabling a power efficient stylus for an electronic device are provided.
claims: 20. A stylus comprising: a housing; and stylus circuitry at least partially positioned within the housing, wherein: the stylus circuitry comprises: body circuitry; a front tip interface component; and front tip stylus circuitry positioned between and electrically coupled to each one of the body circuitry and the front tip interface component; and the front tip stylus circuitry comprises non-linear circuitry that is operative to provide a non-linear load between the body circuitry and the front tip interface component when the stylus is stimulated by an external stimulation from an electronic device, wherein the non-linear circuitry is configured to induce a stylus electric field in the external stimulation that includes a harmonic that is detectable by the electronic device when the front tip interface component of the stylus is positioned adjacent to an input surface of an input component of the electronic device, wherein the front tip stylus circuitry does not generate an electric signal such that the stylus does not generate any stylus electric field independent of any external stimulation and wherein the non-linear circuitry comprises a plurality of diodes including a first diode electrically coupled in series with a second diode.
